category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU version of the tar archiving utility; GNU tar manual describes it as an archiver tool that creates and extracts archives.
display_name_sources: GNU tar homepage/manual use GNU tar; source_facts.name is gnu-tar.
docs_sources: Official GNU tar manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/tar/manual and documents version 1.35.
repo_sources: Official Savannah cgit index lists tar.git as GNU Tar; GNU tar Savannah Git URL discussion confirms https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/tar.git as the correct clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies tar archiving utility; GNU tar manual describes archive creation and extraction workflows.
